plugins.name: clean-code
plugins.description: Clean Code standards for Python and TypeScript: a review subagent and skill for the judgment-tier rules, and a PostToolUse lint hook for the deterministic ones.

plugins.name: patterns
plugins.description: GoF design patterns reference for Python and TypeScript, with an /apply-pattern skill that maps a named pattern onto existing code.

plugins.name: git-workflow
plugins.description: Git workflow helpers: a /refresh command to sync back to an up-to-date main after branch work, and a commit skill for Conventional Commits messages.
